mission.title: strimzi: kafka-exporter "Cannot get describe groups"
mission.description: kafka-exporter "Cannot get describe groups". Users encounter: "msg="Cannot get describe groups: kafka: broker not connected" source="kafka_exporter.go:373"".

steps.title: Identify strimzi troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your strimzi deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=strimzi
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `msg="Cannot get describe groups: kafka: broker not connected" source="kafka_exporter.go:373"`

steps.title: Check current resource configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant strimzi resources:
```bash
kubectl get resource -A
kubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>
```
My Kafka exporter can't connect to the broker and can't describe groups. So I have **missing metrics** in my prometheus instance. 

The **error** in the kafka-exporter logs is : 
```
time="2020-01-30T

steps.title: Apply the fix for kafka-exporter "Cannot get describe groups"
steps.description:
This PR updates the Kafka Exporter to a custom version based on the upstream 1.3.1. 

This should fix several issues reported with it: closes #4561 and Closes #2480.
```yaml
time="2020-01-30T11:22:53Z" level=error msg="Cannot get describe groups: kafka: broker not connected" source="kafka_exporter.go:373"
```

steps.title: Upgrade strimzi to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade strimzi:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade strimzi jetstack/strimzi --namespace cert-manager
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager
helm list -n cert-manager
```

steps.title: Confirm kafka-exporter "Cannot get describe groups" is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `msg="Cannot get describe groups: kafka: broker not connected" source="kafka_exporter.go:373"` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary:
The root cause is: This PR updates the Kafka Exporter to a custom version based on the upstream 1.3.1. 

This should fix several issues reported with it: closes #4561 and Closes #2480.. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.
